prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Ford Duratec 2.3L (MZR L3-VE)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** (8.5 psi boost) and **CP-Carrillo forged pistons (8.5:1 compression)** for hybrid system compatibility, paired with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** to manage the **2004-2008 Tribute Hybrid’s 4F27E transmission** and **Aisin hybrid motor (MGR-10)** torque split.

Full **Koyoritsu Racing** 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system with **MagnaFlow 11376 catalytic converter** and **Borla 40944 muffler** to optimize backpressure for the **L3-VE’s 16-valve DOHC** while maintaining hybrid regen efficiency.

**KW Suspension Variant 3 coilovers (Tribute-specific valving)** with **Eibach Pro-Street S springs (1.5-inch drop)** and **Whiteline KCA399 anti-roll bars** to counteract the **2006-2008 Tribute Hybrid’s 3,800 lb curb weight** and **4WD bias** under hard acceleration.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Tribute Hybrid widebody kit** (custom-fabricated for the **2005-2008 model’s 103.9-inch wheelbase**) with **carbon fiber overfenders** and **dual 3-inch exhaust outlets** integrated into the rear bumper.

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9 +35 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear)** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear)** to fit the **Tribute Hybrid’s 5x114.3 bolt pattern** and **67.1-inch track width**.

**Seibon Carbon fiber hood (OEM replacement, 30% weight reduction)** with **custom NACA ducts** to feed the **Garrett GT2860RS intercooler** and **AEM 3.5-inch intake system**, paired with **VLED Aurora Series LED headlights** for OEM+ aggression.
